name: Llangorse Lake Circular
highlights: Largest natural lake in South Wales; birdwatching and crannog.
points_of_interest: Bronze Age crannog (artificial island); St Paulinus church, Llangasty
viewpoints: Views to Central Beacons across the lake
picnic_spots: Llangasty churchyard; lake shore picnic area
food_drink_nearby: Castle Inn Llangorse; Red Lion Llangorse
hazards_notes: Some road walking; reed beds restrict lake access
